3. .auth-form__message when empty — needs :empty { display: none } to collapse gap
4. .auth-form__cancel — needs styling for the Cancel link on edit_todo.html

Driver: Lea Verou (CSS expertise)
TDD: Verify fmt/clippy/test green, commit+push, CI green, get 9/9 consensus.","assignedBy":"lea-verou","timestamp":"2026-02-08T22:24:07.231Z"}

content.text: That's my own task assignment message echoed back to me. Task #2 is already completed (commit 2b5789a, CI green, awaiting 9/9 consensus). No action needed.
